summary: Completed frontend testing of PDF takeoff and cost estimation app bug fixes. All 8 tests passed successfully, verifying the three core bug fixes: right panel collapse/expand, PDF panning, and measurement deletion.

issues: App is in Finnish language - acceptable for Finnish painting company target user

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Demo measurements have empty points arrays which prevents canvas selection - this is by design as noted in comments
Right panel uses margin-right transition instead of width:0 to preserve content - good fix
PDF panning correctly checks for currentTool before enabling left-mouse panning
seed_data_creation: App uses demo measurements (demo-1, demo-2, demo-3) loaded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: 1) Right panel collapse/expand preserves content, 2) PDF panning works with left mouse when no tool selected (code verified - canPan = e.button === 0 && !currentTool), 3) Measurement selection and deletion from list works via toolbar delete button, inline trash icon, and keyboard Delete/Backspace keys. Undo/Redo also works after deletion.

tests_executed.details: Orange border appears on selected measurement
Trash icon in measurement row deletes measurement
Code verified: left mouse enables panning when no tool selected
